title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 476.460 - Special commissioner subject to temporary duty
text:
476.460.  Special commissioner subject to temporary duty. — Each such special commissioner or referee shall be subject to call by the supreme court for temporary duty in any court of the state to render such duties as may be directed by the supreme court or as may now or hereafter be prescribed by law.
(L. 1951 p. 442 § 2)
